headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Perform on Simon Property Group, Raises Price Target to $220
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Nicholas Yulico   maintains Simon Property Group (NYSE:SPG) with a Sector Perform and raises the price target from $206 to $220.

headline: REITs: Cheap, Unloved, And Finally Showing Life
summary: REITs in 2026 are defying rising yields as fundamentals, M&A, NOI growth, and dividend hikes drive returns.
